  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Missing load reactor on long motor leads",
    "Reflected wave phenomenon (dv/dt voltage spikes) causing motor insulation degradation",
    "High risk of premature motor winding failure and VFD overcurrent trips"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "De-energize the system and lock out/tag out (LOTO) the VFD",
    "Measure motor winding insulation resistance (megger test) to assess degradation",
    "Install an appropriately rated dV/dt filter or load reactor on the output side of the VFD"
  ],
  "rationale": "Operating a VFD with long motor leads without a load reactor or dV/dt filter causes reflected wave phenomenon, leading to voltage spikes that exceed the motor insulation rating. This degrades the winding insulation over time, leading to phase-to-phase or phase-to-ground short circuits and premature motor failure.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Article 430",
    "NEMA MG 1 Part 31",
    "Manufacturer VFD Installation Manuals (long lead length guidelines)"
  ]
}
